input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.1.2
            TITLE: grounded low voltage - glv

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.1.2: Grounded Low Voltage - GLV
EV.1.2 Grounded Low Voltage - GLV 
Every electrical part that is not part of the Tractive System

final_answer: rule EV.1.2: Grounded Low Voltage - GLV Every electrical part that is not part of the Tractive System
